texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Cancellation Policy, which applies once invoiced:
texts.text: Cancellation Policy, which applies once invoiced:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · 60 days or plus before arrival, there is a 15% cancellation fee.
texts.text: 60 days or plus before arrival, there is a 15% cancellation fee.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · 60 to 21 days before arrival, there is a 30% cancellation fee.
texts.text: 60 to 21 days before arrival, there is a 30% cancellation fee.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · 20 days to 4 days before arrival there is 75% cancellation fee.
texts.text: 20 days to 4 days before arrival there is 75% cancellation fee.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · 3 days before arrival or no show: 100% cancellation fee.
texts.text: 3 days before arrival or no show: 100% cancellation fee.
